name: Asparagus Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs. Fresh asparagus, washed and trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1 Steam or boil asparagus for 7-10 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
2 Rinse with cold water and place asparagus on a large platter. Top each piece with red onion.
3 In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients.
4 Drizzle the dressing over the asparagus and serve.
Makes 4-6 servings.
